appDescription.message: Use ChatGPT inside Chrome's sidebar with Sidely - a secure, fast ChatGPT sidebar extension using your own account.

refreshButtonTooltip.message: Reload sidebar to show new chats.

noticeCloudflare.message: You need to complete the Cloudflare check. Open __PORTAL__ in a tab, sign in, then return.
noticeCloudflare.description: __PORTAL__ will be replaced with the ChatGPT host name.

noticeUnauthorized.message: You need to sign in to your ChatGPT account. Open __PORTAL__ in a tab, sign in, then return.
noticeUnauthorized.description: __PORTAL__ will be replaced with the ChatGPT host name.

noticeError.message: Session verification failed. Try refreshing the page or sign in at __PORTAL__.
noticeError.description: __PORTAL__ will be replaced with the ChatGPT host name.

settingsExtensionLanguageHint.message: Switch the Sidely interface language instantly.

settingsThemeHint.message: Choose a light, dark, or auto theme for the sidebar.

featureNoticeChatState.message: New: manage chat states with collapsed or expanded sections.

contextMenuAskSelection.description: %s is replaced by the selected text in the context menu.

featureNoticeAskSelection.message: New: select text on any page, right-click, and ask ChatGPT about it — straight from the sidebar.

settingsQuickActionsHint.message: Right-click selected text on any page for quick actions: translate, summarize, explain, or fix grammar.

settingsTemporaryChatHint.message: Open ChatGPT in a temporary chat that is not saved to your history.

featureNoticeQuickActions.message: New: right-click selected text to translate, summarize, explain, or fix it — and try auto-send and temporary chat in the settings.

donateButtonTooltip.message: Enjoying Sidely? Support it with a one-time donation via Stripe.

settingsDonateHint.message: Sidely is free. If it saves you time, you can support it with a one-time donation via Stripe.

settingsDonateToggleLabel.message: Show donate button in the toolbar
